message:
refactor(fcp-crypto): improve code formatting and documentation

Apply rustfmt formatting and documentation improvements to cryptographic
modules:

## cose.rs (COSE Token Handling)
- Fix doc comments: backtick type names (ObjectId → `ObjectId`)
- Improve method chaining readability with better line breaks
- Consolidate multi-line insert() calls into cleaner single-line form
- Better formatting for checkpoint() and issuing_node() builders

## canonicalize.rs (CBOR Canonicalization)
- Improve map sorting logic formatting
- Better line wrapping for complex expressions

## hpke_seal.rs (HPKE Encryption)
- Add explicit lifetime annotations where needed
- Improve error handling formatting

## kid.rs (Key Identifier)
- Minor formatting improvements for consistency

These changes improve code readability without modifying behavior.
All cryptographic operations remain unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
